message:
test(fcp-cli,fcp-core,fcp-sdk,fcp-raptorq): expand test coverage across 7 modules (+795 tests)

fcp-cli connector module: +70 tests covering HostEndpoint parsing/routing,
rollout_health_label boundaries, print_* formatting edge cases, serde roundtrips,
and FakeRolloutHostClient error paths.

fcp-core capability: +116 tests covering CapabilityId/ConnectorId/OperationId/InstanceId
parsing edges, ZoneId validation, CapabilityGrant/Constraints serde, TrustLevel/TaintLevel/
Provenance, RateLimit/RetryConfig, CorrelationId/SessionId, and error Display coverage.

fcp-core zone_keys: +39 tests covering ZoneKeyId/ObjectIdKeyId boundary values,
ObjectIdKey trait coverage, ZoneKeyRing edge cases, ZoneKeyManifest serde,
wrap/unwrap tampering, RekeyPolicy, and ZoneKeyAlgorithm.

fcp-sdk formatting: +67 tests covering FormatMode copy semantics, validate_html/markdown
boundaries, strip_html/markdown edge cases, classify_error_message variants,
decode_entity/numeric edge cases, ErrorClass/FormatError/RenderResult traits.

fcp-sdk streaming: fix 2 duplicate test names (replay_error_clone_roundtrip,
sequential_enqueue_error_display_detail).

fcp-raptorq + fcp-sdk (lib, retry): +503 tests from previous session carried forward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
